title.en: Ye Tian immediately took away these reincarnati...

content.en:
"I've made a lot of money this time!"

Ye Tian immediately took away these reincarnation flow marrows.

And this is just the beginning, if you continue to search, you will definitely find more reincarnation marrow, and the harvest will be unimaginable.

In the past, he didn't have enough Reincarnation Heavenly Coins to buy Reincarnation Flow, but now he doesn't have to.

The value of the reincarnation flow marrow is very high, and it is of great use to the reincarnation celestial clan that has awakened six times.

For Ye Tian, it is naturally of great use.

If he had enough reincarnation marrow, he could even quickly raise the cultivation of the true body to the limit of the third balance and impact the fourth balance.

After all, the value of the reincarnation flow marrow is very high, and it is especially suitable for him who has cultivated the body of reincarnation Haotian, but it is not so helpful to other Origin Upper Realms.

In terms of value, the reincarnation flow marrow is naturally far inferior to the reincarnation true liquid, but the real value of the reincarnation true liquid is to save the lives of those eight-time awakened Origin Upper Realm overlords, but it is not used to improve cultivation.

If you use those reincarnation true liquids to improve your cultivation, it will be a waste.

Now, Ye Tiandu rarely uses the reincarnation true liquid, and this time he found the reincarnation flow marrow, so he won't use the reincarnation true liquid, and it's not bad to wait for his son in the future!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sent this piece of reincarnation flow marrow back, and then came here to continue to look for the reincarnation flow marrow.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian found another reincarnation marrow, and he was in a good mood.

But it's also more dangerous here, there are a lot of reincarnation spirits and heaven and earth squeezing, and the copy body often falls.

However, compared to the gains, this loss is not worth mentioning.

Gradually, there were more and more reincarnation marrow in Ye Tian's body, and its value was unimaginable.

......

Deep in the ruins of reincarnation.

Ye Tian came here, and he was also the only Origin Upper Realm Overlord who came here.

The danger here is extremely terrifying, the heaven and the earth squeeze a distance, if the heaven and earth squeeze as a point, then this is a dense point.

One can imagine how frequent and chaotic the movement of heaven and earth is here.

However, it is true that the resources here are abundant and precious.

Soon, Ye Tian discovered a resource that far surpassed the reincarnation flow marrow.

It was a crystal that was extremely black, and it contained an infinite void inside, and when touched, the energy on its body would be absorbed by it, and it must be sealed before it could be taken away.

"If I'm not guessing wrong, this should be the Ruin Heaven Realm Crystal!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This is an invaluable treasure, and many shops buy this resource, and there are no stores that sell it.

It was also an occasional opportunity for him to know that the Reincarnation Dark Domain had a treasure resource like the Ruin Heaven Boundary Crystal, but he only knew that the Ruined Heaven Boundary Crystal was worth 1 million reincarnation heavenly coins per gram, and such a piece of the Ruined Heaven Boundary Crystal was at least more than three catties, more than 1,500 grams.

In other words, such a piece of Ruined Heaven Realm Crystal is worth at least more than 1.5 billion reincarnation heavenly coins!

With such a precious Heaven Realm Crystal, those powerful reincarnation celestial clans are not qualified to have it!

The moment he saw this ruin heaven boundary crystal, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

But.

Just as he was approaching the Heaven and Earth Boundary Crystal, he was squeezed by heaven and earth.

Airplanes!

The flesh was directly shattered in half, but he withdrew in time.

Subsequently.

He started to copy his body here, otherwise, it would not be easy to obtain this Ruin Heaven Crystal!

Soon, he copied several copies of his body and continued to approach the Ruin Heaven Realm Crystal.

However, approaching from another position, it still encountered the squeeze of heaven and earth.

Obviously.

The location of the Ruined Heaven Boundary Crystal is afraid that there is more than one Heaven and Earth Squeeze, and it may even be the Heaven and Earth Squeeze where it is located, but it is extremely tough, and the Heaven and Earth Squeeze cannot help this Ruined Heaven Boundary Crystal.

If this is really the case, he must beat out the Ruined Heaven Realm Crystal and get out of the area where heaven and earth squeeze.

"Then do it!"

Ye Tian used the supreme divine power of reincarnation of the Ruin Heaven Spear, rushed into the squeeze of heaven and earth, and fought this copy body to fall, stabbing out a blow and hitting the Ruin Heaven Boundary Crystal, directly causing the Ruin Heaven Boundary Crystal to move a little distance.

And this replica body has fallen.

Subsequently.

He began a second attempt, sacrificing a replica body once more, and making the Heaven Crystal move again.

After repeated attempts, the Heaven Realm Crystal was finally moved out of the range of heaven and earth squeezing.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian easily obtained this piece of the Ruins Heaven Boundary Crystal, and he was in a good mood.

In the years that followed, he used the copy body to try again and again to find the Ruined Heaven Boundary Crystal, but the Ruined Heaven Boundary Crystal was too rare and difficult to find, but he found a lot of other resources, all of which were extremely precious.

this day.

Ye Tian was very lucky, and found another piece of Ruined Heaven Boundary Crystal, which was about the same size as the previous one.

He also spent a lot of copy body before he took the Ruined Heaven Realm Crystal.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian successively obtained a total of six Ruined Heavenly Realm Crystals.

......

"It's almost time, it's time to get out!"

Tunxi muttered.

It's not just that the reincarnation ruins are about to close, but it's also because there are only two slaves left under her hands, and they are both in a state of heavy damage.

Even if they recover, they won't be able to withstand a few explorations!

Moreover, she still has to return, even if she returns the same way, but the way has changed, in case of danger again, so she must keep two slaves to prepare for unknown dangers!

Although the harvest this time is not too big, it is not bad.

She didn't dare to be greedy, or she might stay here.

"Go back!"

Tunxi gave the order.

When the two slaves heard this, they breathed a sigh of relief.

If they go back, they will have hope of surviving, otherwise they will surely die if they continue to explore!

The other side.

Blood Howl is also leaving the ruins of reincarnation.

One by one, the members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan withdrew, not daring to stay here for too long.

At this time.

Ye Tian also roughly calculated that the reincarnation ruin was about to be closed, so he sent all the resources to the replica body and prepared to leave.

Of course, he also left a few words to copy the body to stay here.

......

The exit of the reincarnation ruins.

One by one, the members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan came out, and when some unlucky members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan came out, only one slave was left or directly came out by himself, and all the slaves under his command were wiped out.

And Ye Tian also came out.

"Aochen, you went in alone, and you came out alive?"

When Tunxi saw Ao Chen come out, he was shocked.

"It's just luck, and I didn't go deep!" Ye Tian explained.

Tun Xi also guessed that Ao Chen did not go deeper, otherwise how could he still be alive!
